Petition For 1. Cancellation Of Instrument; 2. Order Confirming Community Interest In Trust Assets Pursuant To Family Code Section 1101(B); 4. Return Of Property Held By Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850; And 5. Financial Elder Abuse.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Possible Transfer To Los Angeles County
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For 1. Cancellation Of Instrument; 2. Court Order To Invalidate The Prematital Agreement And The Postnuptial Agreement Based On Fraud In The Inducement, Or Alternateively, As It Pertains To The Postnuptial Agreement, Based On Mutual Mistake. 3. Order Confirming Community Interest In Trust Assets Pursuant To Family Code Section 1101(B); 4. Return Of Property Held By Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850; And 5. Financial Elder Abuse.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicole Silverstein for Lyn Pretiss, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Kevin Dwight for Pax Prentiss, Respondent/Objector.

The court raised the question of whether San Francisco County is the appropriate venue for the matter. Counsel presented their arguments as to whether San Francisco or Los Angeles is the appropriate venue. The court acknowledged the arguments on both sides but found it inappropriate to transfer venue without further briefing. Counsel were given an opportunity to brief the issue of venue for further consideration.

The court set a hearing on status of possible transfer to Los Angeles County for January 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Petitioner's brief to be filed no later than December 30, 2024. Respondent's opposition to be filed no later than January 13, 2025. Petitioner's reply is to be filed no later than January 21, 2025.

Hearing on the Petition for 1) Cancellation of Instrument, etc. is also continued to January 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
